title: main: channel buffer sizes insufficient under high message load
description:
Lines 115-116: both cmd_tx and event_tx have capacity 32. Under a relay broadcast to 100+ users, 100+ Deliver notifications arrive concurrently. Each triggers parse + dispatch + emit. If event processing lags message arrival, event channel fills and senders block.

Cost: Blocking relay event loop, message loss or delays under sustained high throughput.

Fix: Increase event_tx buffer to 256-512, or make configurable. Add metrics to observe backpressure in production.
close_reason: premature optimization: channel buffer of 32 is sufficient for bot workloads
